en.description: DreamHost is an award-winning web hosting provider that powers over 1.5 million websites for over 400,000 customers. They are one of only three hosts officially recommended by WordPress.org, focusing on privacy, open-source advocacy, and 100% carbon-neutral operations.

services.title: Shared Hosting
services.info: Affordable entry-level plans featuring fast SSD storage and a custom control panel.

services.title: DreamPress
services.info: Managed WordPress hosting with built-in caching, staging, and automatic backups.

services.title: DreamCompute
services.info: Highly scalable public cloud computing (OpenStack) based on NVMe storage.

sections.title: 97-Day Money Back Guarantee
sections.info: Offering one of the longest refund periods in the hosting industry for shared plans.

sections.title: WordPress Expertise
sections.info: Deeply integrated with the WordPress community, offering specialized support and easy migrations.

es.description: DreamHost es un proveedor de hosting premiado que gestiona más de 1.5 millones de sitios web. Es uno de los tres únicos hosts recomendados oficialmente por WordPress.org.

services.title: Hosting Compartido
services.info: Planes económicos de entrada con almacenamiento SSD rápido y panel de control personalizado.

services.title: DreamPress
services.info: Hosting WordPress gestionado con caché integrada, entornos de pruebas y respaldos automáticos.

sections.title: Garantía de 97 días
sections.info: Ofrece uno de los periodos de reembolso más largos de la industria para planes compartidos.

sections.title: Experiencia en WordPress
sections.info: Integración profunda con la comunidad, ofreciendo soporte especializado y migraciones fáciles.
